title: The Shadow
description:
Beware of the shadow

He's watching you...

And he is a stalker...

This is a horror addon :0
body:
The Shadow For Minecraft 1.21.1 My First Horror Mod By The Way!
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ > ### **YOU NEED [GECKOLIB](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib/versions) FOR THIS MOD TO WORK** > > >
> >
> ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ ### **The Shadow** ![ ](https://iili.io/3HZA8jn.png)
(Spoiler) if you look at this then you will see what "The shadow" does Health: 30 Stalks the player DO NOT LOOK AT IT! Makes particles Jumpscare damage: 45 7 Different sounds! If you kill "The shadow" after 3 minutes he will respawn!
![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6cc5b8b21426b4fe537519742d19d0079929c2f3_0.webp) ### **YOU CAN FIND DEAD BODYS IN YOUR WORD** ![ ](https://iili.io/3HZYPVe.png) ### _COLAB WITH RAD GAMING ON YOUTUBE_ ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ ### **TRAILER**
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- > (LET ME KNOW IN THE COMMENTS IN THIS URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=E5-F2jZfyFo IF YOU FIND A BUG, OR YOU HAVE A IDEA FOR THIS MOD!) > > IF YOU SEE THIS MOD ON ANY OTHER WEBSITE THAN: https://mcreator.net/ AND https://modrinth.com > THEN LET ME KNOW IN THE COMMENTS IN THIS URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=E5-F2jZfyFo > > NOTES, (THESE NOTES ARE VERY IMPORTANT PLEASE READ THEM!) > > > NOTE: (IF YOU ARE USEING THIS MOD IN A YOUTUBE VIDEO, PLEASE CREDIT ME!) > NOTE: (THIS MOD IS ONLY ON https://mcreator.net/ AND https://modrinth.com/ IF IT IS ON ANY OTHER WEBSITE, THEN IT IS A FAKE!) ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- ![ ](https://images-wixmp-ed30a86b8c4ca887773594c2.wixmp.com/f/805d3cf6-7d6e-49e8-94eb-7308079bc696/dhue8bn-0146a67c-c555-4778-9338-1446159fd84e.png?token=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..BkphWVzYtgvSI4HsEzVyi2oI782AGD5DwhrJLqAIcKo)
